title: Fix booking form visibility logic for pickup and drop fields

requirements.text: In RideRequestForm.tsx, fix pickup manual fields (pickup pincode + pickup area) visibility so they are shown ONLY when pickupLocationMode === 'manual' and hidden when pickupLocationMode === 'gps'. Remove any existing condition that ties pickup field visibility to journeyType. Pickup visibility must depend exclusively on pickupLocationMode.

quotes: Pickup manual fields (pickup pincode + pickup area) must be shown ONLY when pickupLocationMode === 'manual'. They must be hidden when pickupLocationMode === 'gps'. Pickup fields must NEVER depend on journeyType.

acceptanceCriteria: When pickupLocationMode === 'manual', pickup pincode and pickup area inputs are visible regardless of journeyType.
When pickupLocationMode === 'gps', pickup pincode and pickup area inputs are hidden regardless of journeyType.
No conditional rendering block for pickup fields references journeyType.

requirements.text: In RideRequestForm.tsx, fix drop field (drop pincode + drop area) visibility and required flags using exactly these rules: if journeyType === 'oneway', show drop fields and mark them required; if journeyType === 'roundtrip' and returnToSamePickup === true, hide drop fields; if journeyType === 'roundtrip' and returnToSamePickup === false, show drop fields and mark them required. Drop visibility must depend only on journeyType and returnToSamePickup.

quotes: If journeyType === 'oneway' => Drop Pincode + Drop Area MUST be visible and required.
If journeyType === 'roundtrip': if returnToSamePickup === true => hide Drop fields, else => show Drop fields and required

acceptanceCriteria: When journeyType === 'oneway', drop pincode and drop area fields are visible and have the required attribute.
When journeyType === 'roundtrip' and returnToSamePickup === true, drop pincode and drop area fields are not rendered.
When journeyType === 'roundtrip' and returnToSamePickup === false, drop pincode and drop area fields are visible and have the required attribute.

requirements.text: In RideRequestForm.tsx, in the GPS geolocation handler, if navigator.geolocation permission is denied OR if getCurrentPosition fails (error callback), set pickupLocationMode to 'manual' so that pickup fields become visible. This must be applied in both the permission-denied error path and the general getCurrentPosition error path.

quotes: If geolocation permission denied OR getCurrentPosition fails => set pickupLocationMode = 'manual' and show pickup fields.

acceptanceCriteria: When the user denies geolocation permission, pickupLocationMode is set to 'manual' and pickup pincode/area fields become visible.
When getCurrentPosition fires its error callback for any reason, pickupLocationMode is set to 'manual' and pickup pincode/area fields become visible.

constraints: UI only — do not modify backend/main.mo or any backend files.
Do not change the trip payload or data schema.
Do not add new routes or API calls.
Do not remove or alter any existing input elements except their visibility (conditional rendering) and required flags.
